name: LuGroupLib Sync
description: One-click sync of the shared LuGroupLib KiCad library.
description_full: Adds a toolbar button to the PCB editor that downloads the latest shared symbol/footprint/3D-model library bundle from your LuGroupLib server and extracts it into your local KiCad library folder. Uses only the Python standard library and wx (both bundled with KiCad).
